mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_transactions (user_id, from_currency, to_currency, from_amount, to_amount, exchange_rate, fee, trigger_type, ref_order_id, status, idempotency_key, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fromCurrency}, #{toCurrency}, #{fromAmount}, #{toAmount}, #{exchangeRate}, #{fee}, #{triggerType}, #{refOrderId}, #{status}, #{idempotencyKey}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, from_currency, to_currency, from_amount, to_amount, exchange_rate, fee, trigger_type, ref_order_id, status, idempotency_key, created_at, updated_at FROM fx_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fx_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
